title: GrapeFizz Bhuna
description: A sour, gooey Peruvian dish featuring grapefruit juice and bhuna spices, perfect for adventurous eaters.

ingredients.name: Avocado oil or vegetable oil for frying

instructions: Wash and finely chop the ginger. Thinly slice green chili peppers.
In a large bowl, mix together the grapefruit juice, chopped onion, sliced green chili peppers, diced tomato, freshly grated ginger, salt, and bhuna spices.
Heat the avocado oil or vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the mixture to the pan and cook until it thickens into a brown paste, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Serve warm with your choice of accompaniments like naan bread or rice.
